---
title: " "
image: renaud.jpg
toc: false
about:  
   id: hero-heading
   template: jolla
   image-width: 12em
   image-shape: round
   links:
    - text:  " "
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/renaud-bruno-evina
      icon: linkedin
    - text:  " "
      href: https://github.com/renaud-evina
      icon: github
    - text:  " "
      href: mailto:bruno.evina@gmail.com
      icon: envelope
---
 
:::{#hero-heading .text-center}
**REGIONOMICA** provides solutions in [**public management**]{.text-warning} using [**spatial econometrics**]{.text-warning} and [**productivity & efficiency analysis**]{.text-warning}, with a focus is on [**regional**]{.text-warning} and [**global dynamics**]{.text-warning} 


**REGIONOMICA** oferece soluções em [**gestão pública**]{.text-primary} usando [**econometria espacial**]{.text-primary} e [**análise de produtividade e eficiência**]{.text-primary}, com foco em [**dinâmicas regionais**]{.text-primary} e [**globais**]{.text-primary}

:::
